info.title: Amara API
info.description: Amara provides a REST API to interact with the site for video subtitling and translation. The API supports managing videos, subtitles, users, teams, and activity tracking.

tags.name: Subtitle Actions
tags.description: Perform actions on subtitles (save, publish, approve, reject)

tags.name: Activity
tags.description: Track activity on videos, teams, and users

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for authentication. Generate from your Amara account page.

uri.description: Link to the user API endpoint

subtitles.description: Subtitle data; format depends on sub_format param

sub_format.description: Format used to parse subtitles (dfxp, srt, vtt, sbv, ssa, json)

get.description: List videos. Supports filtering by team, project, URL, and language. Results are paginated.

parameters.name: primary_audio_language_code
parameters.description: Filter by video language (requires team param)

post.description: Add a new video to Amara.

get.description: Get details of a specific video.

delete.description: Delete a video. Must be part of a team where you are an admin.

get.description: List URLs associated with a video. Results are paginated.
Get details on a specific video URL.

put.description: Update a video URL (set as primary).

primary.description: Set to true to make this the primary URL

get.summary: List subtitle languages for a video
get.description: Get a list of subtitle languages for a video. Results are paginated.

post.description: Create a new subtitle language for a video.

put.description: Update subtitle language settings. language_code cannot be changed.

get.description: Get subtitles for a video in a specific language.

parameters.name: version_number
parameters.description: Version number or 'last' for latest private version

post.description: Add new subtitles for a video in a specific language.

delete.description: Delete all subtitle versions for a language. Only allowed for team admins.

get.description: Get the list of available actions for a subtitle set.

post.description: Perform an action on the subtitles (e.g. publish, save-draft, approve, reject).

get.description: Get subtitle editor notes. Results are paginated.
Get information about a user by username or ID.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Username or user ID (prefixed with id$)

get.description: List activity for a specific video. Results are paginated.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only include activity before this date

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only include activity after this date

get.description: List activity for a team. Results are paginated.
List activity for a user. Results are paginated.
List all visible teams. Results are paginated.
List members of a team. Results are paginated.
